log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:11+4=15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 11 falling damage. HP: 167/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:2+4=6 vs DC 16] FAIL — still paralyzed.

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Gnome — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:7+10=17 vs AC 14] HIT! 20 damage. Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 47/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Gnome — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 33/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Gnome — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:6+10=16 vs AC 14] HIT! 23 damage. Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 10/67
→ Gnome — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 7 vs DC 11]
=== ROUND 7 ===
--- Gnome — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Gnome — Bardic Musician is affected by Greater Invisibility.
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Gnome — Bardic Musician with Bite: [d20:5+10=15 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Gnome — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 7 rounds ===
